stages.name: spec_completeness
stages.message: All 11 slides have kind, headline, and notes outline

stages.name: through_line
stages.message: Through-line present in cover slide and called back in closing slide

stages.name: source_grounding
stages.message: Brief-driven deck; all factual claims grounded in known LLM agent failure patterns

stages.name: density_check
stages.message: Speaker-led mode; all slides within density budget

stages.name: no_internal_leakage
stages.message: No runbook internals, kind names, or preset slugs visible in slide text

stages.name: llm_tells_scan
stages.message: No filler openers, hollow intensifiers, unsupported superlatives, or symmetry tics found

stages.name: compilation
stages.message: slidev build exited 0 (warnings only: INVALID_ANNOTATION in upstream @vueuse/core — non-fatal)

stages.name: pdf_export
stages.message: deck.pdf produced via slidev export (331051 bytes)

stages.name: results_hygiene
stages.message: No node_modules/, dist/, or package*.json in /app/results

stages.name: output_files
stages.message: All required deliverables present and non-empty: deck.spec.md, slides.md, deck.pdf, README.md, styles/tokens.css, summary.md, validation_report.json
